description: Drunk Raccoon (DRUNK) is an ATC-20 memecoin about the viral Raccoon who broke into a liquor store, got wasted, got arrested, and became an internet legend. Launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — DRUNK gives holders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability. He’s drunk and jailed. Now our community is bailing him out onchain to build his liquor park across the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Drunk Raccoon
